display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Ring of the Drake
wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Ring of the Drake|2}}{{R|Ring of the Drake|3=2}} is the Starter Upgrade of the [[Slay the Spire 2:Silent|Silent]]'s {{R|Ring of the Snake|3=2}}. The extra card draw is extended to the first 3 turns.
<!-- {{{MORE INFORMATION}}} -->



== Sources ==

After fighting a {{2|Bosses|Boss}}, can be obtained by taking the {{R|Touch of Orobas||2}} from {{2|Orobas}}. Replaces {{R|Ring of the Snake|3=2}}.

== Spawn Restrictions ==
Can only be obtained by [[Slay the Spire 2:Silent|Silent]].

== Interactions ==

=== Order ===

== Strategy ==

Ring of the Drake allows you to draw 7 cards per turn for the first three turns, making it easier to get important Powers into play quickly and drawing through your deck faster.

====Card Synergies====
* {{C|Calculated Gamble||2}} benefits from a larger starting handsize. It will draw more cards and is more likely to be drawn alongside Sly cards. Extra starting draw also makes the downside of decreasing your handsize by 1 less of a problem. 
====Relic Synergies====
* {{R|Candelabra||2}} and {{R|Chandelier||2}} provide extra {{Icon|SE|2}} on the turns when you draw your extra cards, allowing you to play more of them.
=== Anti-Synergies ===
* {{C|Precise Cut||2}} is stronger the fewer cards you have. Starting with additional cards will make it more difficult to maximize this card's potential damage.
* {{R|Screaming Flagon||2}} requires you to empty your hand in order to deal damage, which is harder if starting with more cards.
